reference: Hi, I got kicked in football a week and two days ago to the back of my calf and was in a lot of pain. I thought I would be alright by now, but I still have pain at the front of my leg and I think my ankle is a little swollen. It also feels very tight when I move my foot.
text: Hi. I got kicked in football a week and 2 days ago to the back of my calf and was in a lot of pain. I thought I would be alright by now, but I still have pain at the front of my leg and I think my ankle is a little swollen. It also feels very tight when I move my foot.
